title: phaseolus compressus var. major
intro: Phaseolus compressus var. major, also known as the large bean trefoil or greater bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Phaseolus compressus var. major include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce bloating, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
